subject: deutsche banc alex. brown futures agreement

emails.subject: Deutsche Banc Alex. Brown Futures Agreement
emails.subject_base: Deutsche Banc Alex. Brown Futures Agreement
emails.body: Deutsche Banc Alex. Brown Futures Agreement Sheila: Just a few notes from the Agreement: (1) Par. 2(d) DBAB will use its "reasonable judgment" to value securities or other assets posted as margin (2) Par. 2(e) DBAB will use its then current rates of exchange for any currency conversions (probably not applicable to ENA) (3) Par. 3 Have we agreed to commissions and brokerage charges? These are to be agreed "from time to time" (4) Par. 5 Position Limits: ENA must promptly notify DBAB if ENA is required to file position reports. Can you explain, please? (5) Par. 7(b) Not sure why we're being asked to make this rep. What is ENA's relationship to the Enron FCM these days? (6) Par. 9(a) Trader changes binding on DBAB upon receipt of written confirmation (7) Par. 9(d) verify binding nature of trades Thanks. Sara Sara Shackleton Enron Wholesale Services 1400 Smith Street, EB3801a Houston, TX 77002 Ph: (713) 853-5620 Fax: (713) 646-3490

emails.subject: RE: Deutsche Banc Alex. Brown Futures Agreement
emails.subject_base: Deutsche Banc Alex. Brown Futures Agreement
emails.body: RE: Deutsche Banc Alex. Brown Futures Agreement Sara, Shane and I are okay with: 1 okay 2 okay 3 okay. we have schedule and are okay with it. It is competitive with other Futures clearing charges. 4 okay, we do not do external position reporting 5 Does Metals, Enron Metals Limited, qualify as an FCM? There was some talk about using metals as a futures clearer for GAs so it may be. They cleared our Softs trading for Agri on LIFFE in the uk. 6 okay for trader change notification 7 I have a call into Frank Cernosek, Financial Operations. 5 days from receipt on monthly statement sounds very restrictive. Sara, Is this consistant with other futures agreements? Thanks, Sheila To: Glover, Sheila

emails.subject: FW: Deutsche Banc Alex. Brown Futures Agreement
emails.subject_base: Deutsche Banc Alex. Brown Futures Agreement
emails.body: FW: Deutsche Banc Alex. Brown Futures Agreement Sara, I spoke with Frank Cernosek. Frank felt that the 5 day review window was okay since we are doing a daily check out and confirmation with futures brokers. Sheila
